subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, the Sovereign, the True, the Manifest Justice, sent down from the dominion of your Lord, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله الملک الحق العدل المبین نزلت من جبروت ربکم العلیم الحکیم
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital, @station of the Manifestation of God, @call to action
